place: Cape Yamu, Tambon Pa Klok, Thalang, Phuket, Thailand
title: Elevated Waterfront Villa on Cape Yamu
blurb: An outstanding six-bedroom waterfront villa on the sought-after Yamu Peninsula — refined tropical living across two levels, a 28-metre infinity pool reaching toward the bay, and a full resort-style wellness wing, delivered fully furnished and move-in ready.
detail:
Step into a world of refined tropical living with this outstanding six-bedroom, seven-bathroom villa on the sought-after Yamu Peninsula, blending modern design, warm natural light and calming coastal scenery. It sits on a generous 2,500 m² plot with a substantial 3,994 m² build-up area arranged across two well-planned stories, offering more than enough space to relax, entertain and enjoy the peaceful surroundings, with stunning sea views from several rooms and large windows that welcome fresh breezes and bright daylight.

The property's highlight is an impressive 28-metre infinity pool, its length and orientation creating a smooth visual connection between the water and the bay beyond. The pool deck offers generous space for sunbeds and quiet afternoons by the sea, while an adjacent outdoor BBQ station and landscaped gardens make hosting and sunset dinners effortless. Indoors, a full wellness experience — private gym, spa, sauna and steam room — brings a resort-style lifestyle into everyday life, and the home comes fully furnished with tasteful décor and high-quality materials throughout.

Additional features include a maid's quarter, three-car parking and a private well for both convenience and self-sufficiency. Set within a well-gated community with round-the-clock security, the villa offers complete peace of mind while remaining minutes from Yamu's marinas, international schools, golf courses, shopping and beaches — a rare balance of privacy and easy access to Phuket's top attractions.
